Author: You
Name: Bisme
Punchline: In-game meld optimizer with BisBuddy export and overcap awareness.
Description: FFXIV in-game meld optimizer. Pick a job, load your equipped gear, click Auto-Optimize: the plugin picks the best food and places materia to match the BiS target while respecting per-piece stat caps. Auto-detects job changes, preloads equipped gear, and exports to BisBuddy in one click, with proper HQ flag handling.
Changelog: BiS Variant dropdown: each (job, content) combo now exposes all curated variants from Balance staticbis (e.g. 2.50 / 2.49 / 2.48 GCD speeds, Ultimate vs Relic vs Savage weapon). 128 variants total across 13 jobs. Auto-reloads gear on variant change.
